title: oxyceros kesslerianus
intro: Oxyceros kesslerianus, also known as the Kers, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Oxyceros kesslerianus include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
